title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
